case_title: GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. VS CAMPBELL, RONNALD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, RONNALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, RONNALD $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO RONALD CAMPBELL RETURNED SIGNED.
